title: Change notifications settings of ALL boards at once
excerpt:
Hi, 
Is there a way to set this setting on all boards at once? (see screenshot) 
 
Thanks!

posts.author: ElissaM (Elissa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there a way to set this setting on all boards at once? (see screenshot)

Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ElissaM,

Thanks for writing in!

If you navigate to your profile by clicking on your avatar in the bottom left hand corner, you should be able to adjust the notifications which will apply across your entire account. That said, whilst you’re able to customize the settings to only be notified when assigned to an item, this does not apply to @ mentions. I will be sure to share this feedback with our product team!

Thank you in advance for your understanding, and do let me know if this answers your question!

Best,
Bianca

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
